title: Comfortable Yet Performant
description: A simple modpack providing comfort features, while improving Vanilla performance.
body:
# Comfortable Yet Performant (CyP)

This modpack aims to provide a comfortable experience with extra features that are useful in survival, while also providing improved performance over Vanilla.

Please beware that the rules of the server you're playing on still apply. This modpack is strictly client-side and has no effect on a server that's intentional. Please double check all server rules before playing with this modpack.

## Comfort features

The following features are added upon the Base game:
- 3D Skin Layers
- AppleSkin
- Better statistics menu
- BetterF3 for easy debugging
- Menu blurring
- Capes
- Clicking through Item Frames
- Connected textures
- Discord RPC
- Fullbright
- Highlighting new items added to inventory
- Inventory sorting
- Shader support (Iris)
- Minimap
- JustEnoughItems
  - JustEnoughBreeding (JEBr)
  - JustEnoughResources (JER)
- MixinTrace for easier debugging
- ModMenu
- Panoramica
- Shulkerbox Tooltip
- Visible Barriers
- "Visuality"
- Zoom
